pages.title: Mount Welfare Stats
pages.text: $(l)Includes:$() Horses, Mules, Donkeys, Camels, Caribou $(br2)$(l)Susceptible to:$() Hoof Abscesses, Rain Rot, Saddle Sores, Heartworms, Ringworm, Botflies, Fleas, Ear Infections, Abrasions, Infections, Rabies
$(l)Other Info:$()$(br2)Can have Traits. $(br2)Requires consistent brushing (can become dirty). $(br2)Requires feeding (Grain Feed), unless grazed on grass.
